note: Field-level container: 'Analysis' verified as a key under libraries.Mathlib.modules in catalog/data/hierarchy.json (26746 decls) -- the top-level Mathlib directory covering real/complex analysis, calculus, normed spaces, measure theory adjuncts, special functions, etc. Standard field-level home for the discipline of mathematical analysis; no single decl can stand in for the whole field.

Mathlib/LinearAlgebra/Matrix/PosDef.lean:160-162: 'A matrix M : Matrix n n R is positive definite if it is Hermitian and xᴴMx is greater than zero for all nonzero x.' def PosDef (M : Matrix n n R) := M.IsHermitian ∧ .... The Wikidata concept 'definite matrix' spans both positive- and negative-definite; Matrix.PosDef formalizes the positive-definite case only (negative-definite is recovered as PosDef of -M), so this is the special_case rather than an exact 1:1 join.

Mathlib/CategoryTheory/Triangulated/Triangulated.lean:302-305, docstring verbatim: 'A triangulated category is a pretriangulated category which satisfies the octahedron axiom (TR 4).' class IsTriangulated : Prop where octahedron_axiom .... Built on CategoryTheory.Pretriangulated (Mathlib/CategoryTheory/Triangulated/Pretriangulated.lean:65, the TR1-TR3 axioms of distinguished triangles); together these two classes ARE the standard definition of a triangulated category (@[stacks 05QK] tag on IsTriangulated).
